Article.ArticleTitle: Is Resistance Training to Muscular Failure Necessary?

AffiliationInfo.Affiliation: Laboratory of Neuromuscular Adaptations to Resistance Training, Department of Physical Education, Federal University of São Carlos São Carlos, Brazil.
Laboratory of Neuromuscular Adaptations to Resistance Training, Department of Physical Education, Federal University of São Carlos São Carlos, Brazil.
